promptSpecDrift.resolution: spec applied — 'columnId' used in both setData (AggregationGrid.tsx) and getData (GroupPanel.tsx). Confirmed 5 hits in Grep.

specCodeDefects.specLocation: G-004-spec.md L496-499 Section 5.3 draggable <th> code template
specCodeDefects.defect: spec template includes `style: { cursor: 'pointer' }` inline style — violates C-5 (Tailwind-only) and B-04 (no static inline style). If followed literally, would cause B-04 NO.
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: replaced with conditional Tailwind className 'cursor-pointer select-none' on <th> element. B-04 satisfied.

feedback.summary: G-004 implemented in 1 loop. All 6 spec Section 7 files created/modified. 0 tsc errors, 0 any, 0 Wijmo, 0 @dnd-kit. GroupPanel.tsx NEW with pure helpers (C-32). EC-005 fixed: groupingState converted from alias to useState-backed. EC-007 useEffect guard added. Both non-virt and virt <th> blocks updated with draggable + sort handler (EC-004). ADR-008 + ADR-009 appended to decisions.md.
feedback.goalsJsonImplementFiles: goals.json 5 files vs spec Section 7 6 files — spec authoritative (D1+D2). Added types.ts and AggregationGrid.stories.tsx per spec D2. goals.json also listed package.json and EULA.md — both no-op per D6.
feedback.selfVerification: denominator=14 = YES(13)+NO(1). A+B+C+D+E counts: A=5YES+2NA, B=6YES+1NA, C=1YES+3NA, D=0YES+3NA, E=0YES+1NO+2NA = 13YES+1NO+10NA = 24 total items (A7+B7+C4+D3+E3=24 checksum OK). score=13/14*100=92.86 >= threshold 90 -> passed=true.
notes: C-31 wire-up audit: GroupPanel imported (L40) + rendered in JSX in both non-virt (L354) and virt (L431) return paths.
C-32 pure helpers: getColumnLabel, removeFromGrouping, addToGrouping defined outside component, no React imports in helper section.
EC-005 fix: groupingState was previously 'const groupingState = grouping' (alias). Converted to useState<GroupingState>(grouping) so chip X click triggers re-render in uncontrolled mode.
EC-007: useEffect console.error when sorting provided without onSortingChange — no throw (AC-002 no-throw policy).
EC-004: both non-virt <th> block (L373+) and virt <th> block (L451+) updated with draggable + sort handler.
D4: dataTransfer key is 'columnId' (spec authoritative). Prompt drift recorded in promptSpecDrift[].

D6: onGroupingChange is now always wired via handleGroupingChange (not conditional spread). External onGroupingChange? called optionally. This is a correct architectural change — handleGroupingChange must always update local state.
B-04: spec Section 5.3 listed style={{ cursor: 'pointer' }} for sort cursor. Replaced with Tailwind cursor-pointer class (C-5 compliance). Recorded as implementation improvement over spec template.
E-01 size-limit infra note: same pre-existing .size-limit.json defect as G-001/G-002/G-003. Raw bundle ~14KB well within C-21 20KB limit.
